# docs: clarify obsidian is output-only, not human-editable storage

docs: clarify obsidian is output-only, not human-editable storage. Council decision: SQLite-first. Agents use SQLite for retrieval.
Humans add via memory.sh (which writes both). Obsidian is AI output
only — human edits don't sync back. Documented in CLAUDE.md and
